source.sourcePath: raw/sources/RA/04_제품별 인허가 진행 문서/05_Blue (G1417MCW 외 7종)/▶ 국내 제조인증/2. 250402 보완/기술문서_수정중/2. 첨부자료/성능 시험성적서/[첨부 1.1] a-Si 사양서1.pdf

sourceSummary.oneLine: Preliminary customer acceptance specification for the X216AJ2-101 44.0 cm x 52.0 cm amorphous silicon sensor array.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Provides product requirements, design parameters, electrical and visual inspection criteria, environmental handling requirements, and packaging requirements for the X216AJ2-101 sensor array.
keyPoints: The product is described as a 44.0 cm x 52.0 cm amorphous silicon sensor array with TFT array on PI glass.
The active pixel area is 345.24 mm x 425.6 mm with 2466 x 3040 pixels and 140 um x 140 um pixel size.
Final electrical testing identifies point and line defects by probe test under dark environment.
The device is sensitive to electrostatic discharge and requires a general ESD control program according to 099-JESD625-A.
Packing vibration testing references ISTA STANDARD random vibration conditions.

entities.name: InnoCare 44 cm x 52 cm sensor array
entities.evidence: The InnoCare 44 cm x 52 cm sensor array is a two-dimensional array with thin-film transistor (TFT) switches based on amorphous silicon (a-Si) technology.

entities.name: 099-JESD625-A
entities.evidence: Handling this device requires adoption of a general ESD control program according to 099-JESD625-A, SCD, Requirements for Handling Electrostatic-Discharge-Sensitive (ESDS) Devices.

entities.name: ANSI/ESD STM5.1-2001
entities.evidence: The specification target is HBM class 1B (Voltage range > 500 but <1000V, as described in ANSI/ESD STM5.1-2001).

entities.name: ISTA STANDARD
entities.evidence: Packing Vibration ISTA STANDARD Random, Frequency Range: 1 – 200 Hz

concepts.name: Amorphous silicon sensor array
concepts.evidence: This document provides the product requirement for the X216AJ2-101, 44.0cm x 52.0cm amorphous silicon (a-Si) sensor array.

concepts.name: TFT array on PI glass
concepts.evidence: The process flow of this product is TFT array on PI glass,1st cut.

concepts.name: Final electrical test specification
concepts.evidence: All TFT array panels would be done by the probe test for electrical properties.

concepts.name: Point defect definition
concepts.evidence: Point defect: A point is a point defect when its charge value is 15% higher or less thanPanel Median value in active area.

concepts.name: Appearance visual check specification
concepts.evidence: All TFT arrays are visually inspected.

concepts.name: Electrostatic discharge sensitivity
concepts.evidence: This device is sensitive to electrostatic discharge (ESD).

concepts.name: Packing vibration test
concepts.evidence: Carton Packing should have no failure in the following reliability test items

evidence.claim: The document is a preliminary customer acceptance specification for model X216AJ2-101.
evidence.evidenceText: Preliminary Customer Acceptance Specification Model Name: X216AJ2-101

evidence.claim: The revision history identifies the version as preliminary and says the approval specification was first issued on 2024/8/13.
evidence.evidenceText: preliminary 2024/8/13 All All Approval specification was first issued.

evidence.claim: The X216AJ2-101 is a 44.0 cm x 52.0 cm amorphous silicon sensor array.
evidence.evidenceText: This document provides the product requirement for the X216AJ2-101, 44.0cm x 52.0cm amorphous silicon (a-Si) sensor array.

evidence.claim: The product process flow is TFT array on PI glass, 1st cut.
evidence.evidenceText: The process flow of this product is TFT array on PI glass,1st cut.

evidence.claim: The sensor array has an active pixel area of 345.24 mm x 425.6 mm.
evidence.evidenceText: Active pixel area size 345.24 mm x 425.6 mm

evidence.claim: The sensor array has 2466 x 3040 active area pixels, totaling 7,496,640 pixels.
evidence.evidenceText: Number of active area pixel 2466 x 3040 = 7,496,640

evidence.claim: Each pixel size is 140 um x 140 um.
evidence.evidenceText: Each pixel size is 140 μm x 140 μm.

evidence.claim: All TFT array panels are subject to probe testing for electrical properties.
evidence.evidenceText: All TFT array panels would be done by the probe test for electrical properties.

evidence.claim: Point defects are identified when charge value is 15% higher or less than panel median value in the active area.
evidence.evidenceText: Point defect: A point is a point defect when its charge value is 15% higher or less thanPanel Median value in active area.

evidence.claim: All TFT arrays are visually inspected against white light at 600Lux to 1000Lux.
evidence.evidenceText: The visual inspection includes an inspection of the arrayagainst a white light (light condition: 600Lux~1000Lux)

evidence.claim: Operating temperature is specified as +10 C to +40 C.
Operating relative humidity is specified as 15% to 90%.
The device requires a general ESD control program according to 099-JESD625-A.
evidence.evidenceText: Handling this device requires adoption of a general ESD control program according to 099-JESD625-A, SCD, Requirements for Handling Electrostatic-Discharge-Sensitive (ESDS) Devices.

evidence.claim: The ESD specification target is HBM class 1B as described in ANSI/ESD STM5.1-2001.
evidence.evidenceText: The specification target is HBM class 1B (Voltage range > 500 but <1000V, as described in ANSI/ESD STM5.1-2001).

evidence.claim: Carton packing reliability testing includes vibration testing to ISTA STANDARD random frequency range 1-200 Hz.
evidence.evidenceText: Packing Vibration ISTA STANDARD Random, Frequency Range: 1 – 200 Hz

reviewFlags.reason: Authority or jurisdiction is not stated in the source text; authoritySignal metadata indicates MFDS/domestic but no authority evidence appears in the document content.
Document dates conflict: pages 1-9 show Issue date 2024/8/13, while pages 10-14 show Issue date Jan. 17st, 2020.
The document is marked Preliminary and customer approval fields appear blank.
Some OCR text has spacing and recognition issues, including 'less thanPanel', 'arrayagainst', and 'humidityand'.
